standard: a relentless series of clubbing right hands
a rib-cracking body avalanche in the corner
a grinding knee to the gut
a biting right hand straight to the jaw
a vicious elbow to the back of the neck
a dirty chokehold in the corner
a dropkick square to the knee
a suicide dive through the ropes
a calculated dragon screw leg whip
a clinical crossbody off the second rope
